widget.name: Skip link
widget.description: A skip link for accessibility, allowing users to jump directly to the main content.

property.caption: Link text
property.description: The text displayed in the main skip link (e.g., "main content" will result in "Skip to main content")

property.caption: Target element ID
property.description: The ID of the element to move focus to (e.g, main). This should match the element's 'id' on the page. If empty, the widget will use the 'main' element if available.

property.caption: Skip links
property.description: Additional skip link targets for navigation

property.caption: Link text
property.description: The text displayed in the skip link (e.g., "navigation" will result in "Skip to navigation")

property.caption: Target element ID
property.description: The id of the content element to jump to

property.caption: Skip to prefix
property.description: The prefix text used for all skip links (e.g., "Skip to" results in "Skip to main content", "Skip to navigation")
